title: T-108 — Rule Version Diff screen (SET-042 §7.6)
prompt:
# T-108 — Rule Version Diff screen (SET-042 §7.6)

PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §7.6 (Rules UI surfaces)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build SET-042 Rule Version Diff — side-by-side JSON deep diff comparing two `rule_definitions` versions for a given `rule_code`. Read-only. Used as a drilldown from SET-041 (Rule Detail). Diff highlights added / removed / changed paths with stable JSON sort.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/rules/[rule_code]/diff/page.tsx is a Server Component reading two `rule_definitions` rows by `?from=<version>&to=<version>` query params (T-025 read-only Server Action).
2. Compute deep diff with a deterministic JSON sort + recursive walker; categorize each path as `added`, `removed`, or `changed`.
3. Render two columns (left=from, right=to) using shadcn ScrollArea + a code-block primitive; highlight diffed paths with token-level color (added=green, removed=red, changed=amber).
4. Header strip shows: rule_code, from version + status badge, to version + status badge, total counts (added/removed/changed).
5. RBAC: requires `settings.rules.read` only (read-only screen).

## Files
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/rules/[rule_code]/diff/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/rules/[rule_code]/diff/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test seeds two rule versions with known JSON shapes (one added field, one removed, one changed value); assert diff column counts + path highlighting.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/rules/[rule_code]/diff/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + diff helper + columns.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not introduce write actions (read-only per §7).
- Do not include external diff libraries with copyleft licenses; use a small in-repo recursive diff helper.
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0).

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:216-344`
**Label:** `rule_detail_screen`
**Component type:** tabs

> **No exact prototype** — closest visual pattern: `rule_detail_screen` at `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:216-344`. Build in the same structural style as this screen. Re-use the Rule Detail screen's `ver` tab + 'Diff vs current' button layout (admin-screens.jsx tab content around lines 279-298). Render side-by-side diff using two shadcn ScrollArea columns inside the same Section/page-layout shell.

### Parity requirements (mandatory ACs)
The production implementation MUST match the prototype on three dimensions — add these as explicit ACs:
1. **Structural parity** — same sections, same field labels, same shadcn primitives invoked, same modals triggered from same actions.
2. **Visual parity** — same density tokens, same shadcn/Radix primitives (no drift to plain HTML), same layout proportions.
3. **Interaction parity** — same enable/disable rules, same loading/empty/error states, same keyboard focus order.

### Translation notes (from prototype-labels index)
- Tab state (def/ver/dry/cons/aud) with local useState → shadcn Tabs component; tab id from URL hash for deep-linking
- window.SETTINGS_RULE_DSL / window.SETTINGS_DRY_RUNS → Drizzle queries on rules_dsl and rule_dry_run_results tables
- DSL <pre> read-only display → CodeMirror or Monaco in read-only mode with JSON syntax highlighting
- Version history table (Array.from loop) → real version rows from rules_registry_versions table
- 'Diff vs current' button → Server Action calling /api/rules/:code/diff/:version returning JSON deep-diff
- Dry-run results table → paginated query on rule_dry_run_results; 'View I/O' opens RuleDryRunModal with preloaded result
- openModal('ruleDryRun') → shared Dialog trigger; pass rule and preload props
- Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

### shadcn primitives to use
`Tabs`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`, `TabsContent`, `Table`, `Badge`, `Button`

pipeline_inputs.description: Rule Version Diff (SET-042) — side-by-side JSON deep diff between two rule_definitions versions, read-only.
pipeline_inputs.details:
PRD §7.6 SET-042: `JSON deep diff (side-by-side)`. Read-only per §7 (rules registry is read-only via UI; authoring in PR/migrations only). Diff helper must be deterministic across runs (sort object keys before walk) so snapshot tests are stable. No external diff lib — small in-repo helper.

Additional acceptance detail preserved from compressed AC list:
- Given the caller lacks `settings.rules.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.
- UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Given two rule versions exist (v1 and v2 for rule_code='allergen_cascade_v1'), when /settings/rules/allergen_cascade_v1/diff?from=1&to=2 is loaded, then a side-by-side diff renders with header showing 'v1 → v2' and total counts of added/removed/changed paths.
Given v2 adds a `definition_json.threshold` key not present in v1, when the diff renders, then that path is highlighted green on the right column and absent on the left column.
Given v2 removes a key present in v1, when the diff renders, then that path is highlighted red on the left column and absent on the right.

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect the task evidence, then these additional requirements are proven together: Given the caller lacks `settings.rules.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.; UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test seeds two JSON versions with one add/one remove/one change; asserts column counts, highlight classes, RBAC.
GREEN: implement deterministic diff helper + Server Component + side-by-side render.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not introduce write actions (read-only per §7).
Do not include external diff libraries with copyleft licenses; use a small in-repo recursive diff helper.
